bio.heading: About Mario Acosta
bio.body: With over 20 years of experience in the tile and stone trade, Mario Acosta brings the precision of a craftsman and the eye of an artist to every project. Starting as an apprentice at 17, Mario has honed his skills across hundreds of residential and commercial installations — from intricate mosaic bathrooms to expansive natural stone patios.
bio.body2: Family-owned and locally operated, we take pride in delivering work that lasts — work you can feel underfoot, see on your walls, and be proud to show your guests.

photo.alt: Mario Acosta, tile and stone contractor, standing in a completed project

quality.title: Quality Materials
quality.desc: We source only premium tiles and stones, and we never cut corners on substrate preparation — the foundation of any lasting installation.

craftsmanship.title: True Craftsmanship
craftsmanship.desc: Every cut, every grout line, every transition piece is done with intention. We believe the details are what separate good work from great work.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.desc: We show up on time, communicate clearly, and finish what we start. Our clients trust us in their homes — we take that seriously.

local.title: Local & Committed
local.desc: We live and work in this community. Building lasting relationships with our neighbors is just as important as building lasting floors.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.subtext: Ready to start your project? We offer free, no-obligation estimates.

message.label: Tell us about your project
message.placeholder: Describe the space, the type of tile or stone you have in mind, and your timeline...

form.success: Thank you! We'll be in touch within one business day.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or call us directly.
